label: base-character
prompt: Chloe, a 20-year-old American college student, broke and relatable. Mid-length messy brown hair in a casual style, fair skin with natural texture and a couple of small blemishes, a friendly tired-but-cheerful expression, minimal makeup. Wearing a plain solid-colour hoodie or crew tee, no logos or graphics. Hyper-realistic photograph with super-detailed true-to-life skin texture: visible pores, fine lines, subtle natural blemishes and freckles, slight uneven skin tone and natural imperfections, not airbrushed and not too perfect. Natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.
